title: craftable nautilus armor
description: You can craft any nautilus armor with a nautilus shell and 8 ingots !
body:
This project is now a part of "KS Recipes" : https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-recipes-datapack
Check it out for more recipes overhaul to the vanilla experience !



You can now craft any nautilus armor with a nautilus shell surrounded by 8 ingots !!!

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4749e74462192517710d25bc1f3292c7f1823af.png)
